narrative:
Harrison Township C (precinct in Licking County) has 947 registered voters, with 41.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
